Toolbar

The Toolbar contains tools for interaction, analysis and editing.

  • Search
  • 3D View
  • Side-by-Side

  • Distance
  • Area

Drawing

  • Draw features
  • Comments
  • Editing

Analysis Tools

  • Profile Tool
  • Raster comparison
  • Time lapse
  • Cross sections
